untranslatable_reason: High and Tight Flags require visual pattern recognition (flag height classification: short vs tall, narrow vs wide consolidation zones) which cannot be expressed using only the available indicators. The signal requires measuring flag height variance, consolidation width, and pattern morphology—none of which map to RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, or other quantitative indicators provided. Exit conditions are marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no specific exit rules defined.
translation_notes: Attempted to translate breakout entry (close > bb_upper for tightness) and reversal exit (close < sma_20), but the core pattern definition—distinguishing short/tall and narrow/wide flag variants with their respective success rates (74% for short+wide bull, 59% for tall+wide bull)—requires custom pattern detection logic not available in the allowed indicator set. The 17-day average formation length is mapped to hold_days_max. A proper implementation would need a dedicated flag pattern detector or explicit height/width ratio measurements.
